sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SK Telecom partners with Arm, Rebellions for AI data center solutions
feed.summary: SK Telecom has partnered with British chip design company Arm and Korean AI chip startup Rebellions to develop AI data center solutions. They will combine Arm's new AGI CPU and Rebellions' upcoming AI accelerator chip for AI inference server solutions. These solutions will be tested in SK Telecom's AI data centers, and the company plans to operate its sovereign AI foundation model, A.X K1, on these new servers.

feed.title: Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy Stock Surges as Core Business Offsets $241 Million Net Loss
feed.summary: Despite reporting a full-year 2025 net loss of $241 million, Galaxy Digital's stock surged over 11% due to strong performance in its core Digital Assets segment and strategic expansion into AI and data centers. CEO Mike Novogratz emphasized the shift from "narrative to infrastructure" in the digital asset sector, highlighting the company's focus on institutional markets, asset management, blockchain infrastructure, and AI data centers. Investors are focusing on Galaxy's scalable business lines and long-term infrastructure exposure rather than short-term profitability, especially given its new contract with CoreWeave.

feed.title: Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) Price Target Lowered to $96.00 at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has lowered its price target for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) from $100 to $96, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 26% upside. Despite the lowered target, the analyst consensus remains "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $83.48, following the company's recent earnings beat with an EPS of $0.51 and revenue of $2.10 billion, marking a 17.6% year-over-year increase. Various other analysts have also adjusted their price targets and ratings on MNST, reflecting ongoing evaluation of the beverage company.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) Reports Q1 2026 Results
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) reported its Q1 2026 financial results, with operating revenue reaching $15.9 billion and a net loss of $289 million, largely due to higher fuel costs and non-operating expenses. Despite profitability challenges, the airline saw a 9.4% increase in adjusted revenue driven by strong demand across corporate and leisure travel segments. Looking ahead, Delta forecasts low-teens revenue growth for Q2 2026 and expects to generate approximately $1 billion in pre-tax profit, while navigating a higher fuel price environment.

feed.title: Another Firefighter gear class action alleges PFAS exposure as California county sues
feed.summary: The County of San Mateo has filed a class action lawsuit against 3M Company, DuPont De Nemours Inc., and 17 other companies, alleging they manufactured and sold firefighter gear containing toxic PFAS. The lawsuit claims these companies knew about the dangers of PFAS for decades but failed to warn public entities and firefighters, thereby exposing them to serious health risks. The county seeks to represent a nationwide class of entities that purchased PFAS-contaminated firefighter gear and is pursuing punitive and compensatory damages.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Lowers Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) Price Target to $115.00
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has lowered its price target for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) to $115.00 from $155.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target implies an 18.6% potential downside, although the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $156.27. The biopharmaceutical company recently exceeded earnings and revenue estimates and is actively pursuing oncology strategy through acquisitions like Tubulis.

feed.title: The Hartford Financial Svcs stock: Why analysts see upside potential now
feed.summary: Analysts are showing increased confidence in The Hartford Financial Svcs (NYSE:HIG) following strong 2025 financial results. With price target upgrades from firms like Wells Fargo and a "moderate buy" consensus, the company, valued for its stability in the insurance sector, is seen as having upside potential. Its diversified insurance offerings and disciplined underwriting contribute to its appeal for investors seeking defensive financial exposure.

feed.title: JPMorgan Downgrades Hormel Foods Stock As Rising Cost Pressures Threaten Profit Margins
feed.summary: JPMorgan downgraded Hormel Foods (HRL) stock from Overweight to Neutral, cutting its price target to $23, following the company's Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings report. Despite organic net sales growth, rising costs for beef, pork, nuts, and increased freight expenses are severely impacting profit margins. While management reaffirmed full-year guidance, achieving these targets relies on significant profit acceleration in the second half, which analysts view as uncertain.

feed.title: New pet relief areas coming to Shirlington amid streetscape renovations
feed.summary: The Village at Shirlington's ongoing renovations will introduce two new pet relief areas, located outside Dogma Bakery and Shirlington Animal Hospital. These areas will replace an existing large planter and feature crushed stone and boulders with hose bibbs for regular washing. The broader renovation project focuses on pedestrian-oriented upgrades, including expanded sidewalks, new signage, improved lighting, and public art installations, with the final phase of construction expected to conclude in November.

feed.title: Iron Mesa safely enters next phase of construction
feed.summary: Phillips 66's Iron Mesa plant in the Permian Basin is advancing to its next construction phase with strong safety performance, having logged over 77,000 safe work hours. This project is crucial for processing growing natural gas production in the Permian, converting raw gas into usable products like pipeline-quality gas and natural gas liquids. Iron Mesa, with its 300 MMscfd capacity, will enhance Phillips 66's Midstream network and complement existing infrastructure to efficiently deliver energy to markets.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Issues Pessimistic Forecast for PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) from $135 to $130, while maintaining an "overweight" rating, suggesting a 17.39% upside. This adjustment follows PPG missing expected quarterly EPS ($1.51 vs. $1.57) despite a 5% year-over-year revenue increase and setting its FY2026 EPS guidance between $7.70 and $8.10. The consensus analyst rating for PPG remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $120.14.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) Given New $303.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) to $303.00 from $327.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of approximately 10.7% from the stock's current price. Analyst sentiment for ITW is mixed-to-negative, with a consensus rating of "Reduce" and an average target price of $270.00, despite the company recently beating earnings estimates and providing solid FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) Given New $40.00 Price Target at BNP Paribas Exane
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has lowered its price target for Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) to $40.00 from $47.00, maintaining an "underperform" rating, which suggests a potential 10.69% downside. This contrasts with the broader analyst consensus of a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $68.95. The report also highlights that FIS slightly missed Q4 EPS expectations but beat on revenue, and its CEO recently purchased a significant amount of company stock.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Diamondback Energy Price Target to $245 From $240, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG) to $245 from $240, while reaffirming its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial institution on the energy company's valuation.

feed.title: Corning Inc Stock (GLW) Opened Up by 3.26% on Apr 10: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Corning Inc (GLW) stock opened up by 3.26% due to strong performance in its optical communications segment, driven by increased demand for AI infrastructure. The company reported robust Q4 2025 results, provided encouraging Q1 2026 guidance, and secured a significant deal with Meta Platforms, reinforcing its position as a key enabler in the AI and cloud markets. Despite some valuation concerns, positive analyst sentiment and strategic expansion plans continue to attract investor interest.

feed.title: PTC Therapeutics (NASDAQ:PTCT) Now Covered by Analysts at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has initiated coverage on PTC Therapeutics (NASDAQ:PTCT) with an "Outperform" rating and a $108 price target, indicating a potential 52% upside. This follows a significant quarterly earnings miss for PTC Therapeutics, with reported EPS of -$1.67 against an expected -$0.21, and revenue of $164.7M versus $281.5M anticipated. Despite insider stock sales totaling approximately $8.5 million in the past 90 days, the company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $84.40.

feed.title: Amgen’s Tarlatamab Approved in China
feed.summary: Amgen's bispecific T-cell engager tarlatamab has received regulatory approval in China for adult patients with extensive-stage small cell lung cancer whose disease progressed after chemotherapy. Marketed as Imdelltra in the US, the drug demonstrated significant clinical benefits in the Phase II DeLLphi-301 study, including a 46.3% objective response rate and a median overall survival of 19.0 months, with a manageable safety profile. The approval expands Amgen's oncology presence in a major cancer market, with analysts projecting potential annual global sales exceeding $2 billion.

feed.title: Textron (TXT) Unveils Upgrades for Cessna Piston Aircraft Lineup
feed.summary: Textron Aviation has announced significant upgrades for its Cessna piston aircraft models, including the integration of Garmin G1000 NXi System Release 7 avionics and a Lycoming dual electronic ignition system, expected to be operational by late 2026 to early 2027. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 90, indicating high profitability and financial strength, the company has seen $30 million in insider sales over the past three months with no purchases, which could be a concern for investors. Textron's P/E ratio of 17.86x is also near its 1-year high, suggesting a potentially high valuation.

feed.title: Apple TV Lands On Amazon Prime Video In US Streaming Tie-Up
feed.summary: Apple TV is expanding its reach by becoming available as an add-on subscription through Amazon Prime Video in the U.S. This partnership will allow Prime members to access Apple's original content, live sports, and shows directly within the Prime Video ecosystem for $9.99 per month, eliminating the need for separate apps. Both companies are prominent in the streaming and tech industries, with this move aiming to enhance content accessibility for consumers and further establish Prime Video as a comprehensive entertainment hub.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Rollins to $58 From $62, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has revised its price target for Rollins (ROL) shares down to $58 from $62, while keeping a "Neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news regarding Rollins, including reports of weather-related headwinds impacting its Q1 organic growth and margin expansion, as highlighted by RBC. Rollins has also recently announced acquisitions, such as Romex Pest Control.

feed.title: MetLife Inc stock: UBS Buy rating and $102 target signal upside potential
feed.summary: UBS has reconfirmed its 'Buy' rating for MetLife Inc. (NYSE:MET) and raised its price target to $102, signaling confidence in the insurer's strong earnings and global expansion efforts. MetLife surpassed quarterly EPS expectations and saw significant revenue growth, driven by its diversified business model across the U.S., Asia, Latin America, and EMEA. This analyst optimism, combined with the company's solid financial performance and strategic asset management, suggests potential upside for investors seeking reliable dividends and growth.

feed.title: RBC Capital reiterates Abbvie stock Outperform rating at $260 target
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated an Outperform rating on AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) with a $260 price target, ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report on April 29th. The firm anticipates in-line results for key products Skyrizi and Rinvoq, but suggests a clear beat will be necessary to shift the current negative sentiment surrounding the stock. Despite this, RBC Capital maintains a constructive medium-term view for AbbVie, citing strong fundamentals, significant opportunity in the inflammatory bowel disease market, and an attractive valuation at approximately 15 times its 2026 estimated price-to-earnings ratio.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) After Its Strong 1‑Year Run?
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) has seen significant stock gains over the past year, prompting an assessment of its current valuation. An Excess Returns analysis suggests the stock is 48.6% undervalued, while a comparison of its P/E ratio to its "Fair Ratio" also indicates undervaluation despite trading above industry averages. The article encourages investors to develop their own narrative for the stock's future value.

feed.title: Japan Post cuts Aflac (NYSE: AFL) holdings with 166,000-share sale
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd., a ten percent owner of Aflac Inc., sold 166,000 shares of Aflac common stock in three tranches on April 8, 2026, through indirect holdings via the J&A Alliance Trust. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from approximately $111.78 to $112.98 per share, totaling over $18.6 million. Following these transactions, Japan Post Holdings and related entities indirectly own 51,723,100 shares of Aflac, though they disclaim beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: U.S. Bank Lands First Standalone NFL Banking Deal in 30 Years
feed.summary: U.S. Bank has secured a multi-year partnership with the NFL, becoming the league's official bank and wealth management sponsor. This deal marks the first standalone NFL banking agreement in 30 years, emerging from a restructuring of the league's financial services rights. The partnership includes sponsoring the Super Bowl MVP Award and launching "Financial Edge," a program focusing on financial literacy for players, fronted by NFL Draft prospect Fernando Mendoza.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) Price Target Cut to $96.00 by Analysts at Evercore
feed.summary: Evercore analysts have reduced their price target for T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) from $99.00 to $96.00, citing a potential upside of 4.28%. This follows several other analysts lowering their price objectives or reiterating "hold" ratings on the asset manager. The company recently missed its quarterly earnings per share consensus but exceeded revenue expectations, and institutional investors have significantly modified their holdings in the stock.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Has Lowered Expectations for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) Stock Price
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) to $110 from $142, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 29% upside. This adjustment follows Builders FirstSource missing earnings and revenue expectations, despite a director increasing his stake by almost 3%, signaling insider confidence. Analyst consensus on the stock is currently "Hold" with a target price of $122.71.

feed.title: Floating LNG Market (2026): K LINE Bio-LNG Use, Offshore CO2 Carrier AiP & Shinkurushima SSS Shipyard Developments & Japan Growth | Top Companies 2026 - Idemitsu Kosan, JERA, Tokyo Gas, Cheniere Energy, Sempra Infrastructure, Golar LNG, Höegh LNG
feed.summary: DataM Intelligence has released a new research report on the Floating LNG Market for 2026, offering insights into market dynamics, segmentation, and growth drivers. The report highlights significant industry developments, including FERC advancements for LNG export terminals, Cheniere Energy's expanded export volumes, and Sempra Infrastructure's Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 development. It also covers `K` LINE's adoption of Bio-LNG for decarbonization, an offshore CO2 carrier receiving first-class approval for CCS, and strategic growth in Japan's LNG sector by players like Idemitsu Kosan, JERA, and Tokyo Gas.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) to $20 | HST Stock News
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has maintained an "Equal-Weight" rating for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) but raised its price target from $18.00 to $20.00, an 11.11% increase. This adjustment signals a positive outlook despite the unchanged rating. Other analysts also recently raised their price targets for HST, with the average target price from 18 analysts being $21.50, implying an 8.04% upside from its current price.

feed.title: AbbVie First-Quarter Earnings Unlikely to Lift Sentiment, RBC Says
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets believes that AbbVie's first-quarter earnings, scheduled for release on April 26, are unlikely to significantly boost investor sentiment. The firm anticipates a 1% year-on-year sales decline and a 7% drop in adjusted EPS, predicting that these results will not change the current cautious outlook on AbbVie. RBC maintains its "sector perform" rating and $173 price target on the stock.

feed.title: Mizuho Issues Positive Forecast for Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Stock Price
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) to $565 with an "outperform" rating, citing AI/datacenter-driven HDD pricing and margin gains as a major tailwind. Seagate recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, with revenue up 21.5% year-over-year. Despite recent insider stock sales, institutional ownership remains high at approximately 92.9%, underscoring strong confidence in the company’s future performance.

feed.title: U.S. Army awards PAC-3 MSE contract worth $4.76 billion to Lockheed Martin
feed.summary: The U.S. Army has awarded Lockheed Martin a $4.76 billion contract for the production of PAC-3 MSE Patriot interceptors, a leading high-end air and missile defense missile. This contract, set to be completed by June 30, 2030, includes significant Foreign Military Sales funding, indicating high international demand. The PAC-3 MSE is engineered for "hit-to-kill" engagements against various advanced threats, reflecting its growing importance in global defense strategies.

feed.title: Hilton to build 125 hotels in India in major expansion push
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings has partnered with Regenta Hotels Pvt. Ltd. to open 125 Hampton by Hilton hotels across western and southern India by 2035. This expansion accelerates Hilton's presence in India's upper-midscale segment, driven by the country's growing middle class and increased domestic travel. This is Hilton's third major agreement in India, following partnerships with NILE Hospitality and Olive by Embassy for comparable hotel developments.

feed.title: FGI Industries, Nouveau Monde Graphite and other big stocks moving lower in Friday's pre-market session
feed.summary: This article lists several stocks, including FGI Industries and Nouveau Monde Graphite, that are experiencing downward movement in Friday's pre-market trading session. It indicates a negative trend for these companies before the market officially opens.

feed.title: Disney Just Made Another Major Executive Change To Reshape the Communications Structure
feed.summary: Disney has announced a significant reorganization of its communications structure, highlighted by the promotion of April Carretta to Executive Vice President of Communications. In this role, Carretta will serve as the primary communications lead for Dana Walden, Disney's President and Chief Creative Officer. This move is part of broader changes outlined by Chief Communications Officer Paul Roeder, designed to redefine reporting lines and expand leadership portfolios to align with Disney's strategic priorities and ongoing transitions.

feed.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Citigroup Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Ahead of its Q1 earnings release on April 14, Citigroup (NYSE: C) is drawing investor attention. Analysts expect increased earnings and revenue, with varying price targets from Evercore ISI Group and Goldman Sachs. The article also details how investors can earn $500 monthly from Citigroup's 1.92% annual dividend yield, requiring an investment of approximately $312,300, or about 2,500 shares.

feed.title: Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund declares dividend
feed.summary: The Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) has declared a tax-free dividend of $0.0450 per share, with record and ex-dividend dates set for April 23, 2026, and a payable date of May 1, 2026. The fund also redeemed 200 Variable Municipal Term Preferred Shares on April 2, 2026, reducing its outstanding leverage. Federated Hermes, Inc., a global leader in active investment management, manages $902.6 billion in assets as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Tax-free income fund keeps monthly payout at 4.5 cents for May 1
feed.summary: Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (FMN) has declared a tax-free monthly dividend of $0.0450 per share for May 1, 2026. The fund also announced the redemption of 200 variable municipal term preferred shares on April 2, 2026, which reduced its outstanding leverage. These distributions are exempt from regular federal income tax and the federal alternative minimum tax.

feed.title: FDVV ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:FDVV
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Fidelity High Dividend ETF (FDVV), detailing its investment strategy, holdings, and performance. FDVV invests in U.S. and developed international equities with high dividend yields, low payout ratios, and strong dividend growth. The ETF has assets under management of $8.62 billion and an expense ratio of 0.15%, and it pays quarterly dividends.

feed.title: GIBO Unveils New Technology for AI Filmmaking
feed.summary: GIBO Holdings Ltd. has launched a new system under its GIBO WATCH framework aimed at improving continuity and contextual consistency in AI-generated filmmaking. This system incorporates a Context-Retention Engine, a Version Control & Collaboration System, and an Automated QA Engine to enhance production efficiency and quality, particularly for the growing demand in short-form video content. This development marks a significant step towards achieving production-grade AI filmmaking.

feed.title: Consumers' Vision Care Decisions Clouded by Costs, According to New Study from CareCredit, a Synchrony Solution
feed.summary: A new study by CareCredit, a Synchrony solution, reveals that the high cost of vision care is a significant barrier for U.S. consumers, deterring them from necessary treatments and services. A substantial financing gap exists, with many patients willing to switch providers for payment options, yet few are offered them. This issue is particularly prevalent among Gen Z, who cite cost as a major factor affecting their access to vision care, including procedures like LASIK.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Mid-America Apartment Communities PT to $140 From $141, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Baird has adjusted its price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) to $140 from $141, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the analyst's valuation for the residential REIT. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments for MAA from other firms, showcasing ongoing re-evaluations within the sector.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Communication Services Companies: Meta Platforms (META) and AppLovin (APP)
feed.summary: Two communication services companies, Meta Platforms (META) and AppLovin (APP), have received bullish sentiments from analysts. J.P. Morgan reiterated a Buy rating for Meta Platforms with a price target of $825.00, while Morgan Stanley maintained a Buy rating on AppLovin with a price target of $720.00. Both companies have a "Strong Buy" analyst consensus, indicating positive outlooks for their stocks.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Secures First Contract for PAC-3 MSE Accelerated Production, Strengthening the Arsenal of Freedom
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has been awarded a $4.7 billion contract by the U.S. government for the accelerated production of PAC-3 Missile Segment Enhancement (MSE) interceptors. This contract aims to significantly increase the delivery of these advanced air defense missiles for American and allied forces, building on a framework agreement signed earlier this year to ramp up production as part of the administration's Acquisition Transformation Strategy. Lockheed Martin has invested heavily in expanding its capacity and workforce to meet the urgent demand for these critical munitions.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Vulcan Materials (VMC) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains?
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (VMC) has seen significant share price gains over multiple years, but current valuation checks suggest it might be overvalued. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis estimates an intrinsic value of $263.74 per share, indicating it's 11.1% overvalued compared to its current price of around $293. The company's P/E ratio of 35.4x is also higher than the industry average, pointing towards an overvaluation based on earnings.

feed.title: Apple leads global smartphone shipments in Q1 despite overall shipments declining: Counterpoint
feed.summary: Apple led global smartphone shipments in the first quarter of 2026, experiencing a 5% year-over-year growth, even as overall market shipments declined due to memory component shortages and weak demand. The company's ultra-premium positioning, integrated supply chain, strong iPhone 17 demand, and strategic initiatives in the Asia-Pacific region, along with trade-in programs, helped it navigate market headwinds. Other Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) are adapting by prioritizing value over volume, refining product configurations, and adjusting pricing strategies.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Sourcery Founder Molly O'Shea Joins as a Media Partner
feed.summary: The NYSE announced that Sourcery Founder Molly O'Shea has joined as a media partner to expand technology and investing coverage. This update also highlights various NYSE activities, including a pre-market update delivered by Kristen Scholer, the upcoming splashdown of Artemis II, and the celebration of 50 years of options trading on NYSE Arca Options. The announcement encourages downloading the NYSE TV App for market insights.

feed.title: Occidental Discovers Oil Near Existing Infrastructure off Louisiana
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corp announced an oil discovery in the Green Canyon Block 680 in the United States' Gulf of America. The "Bandit" well, located 125 miles south of Louisiana, found high-quality oil-bearing Miocene sands and has potential for subsea tie-backs to existing Occidental-operated facilities. This discovery strengthens Occidental's Gulf of America portfolio and contributes to long-term energy security, with Occidental holding a 45.375% stake, Chevron Corp 37.125%, and Woodside Energy Group Ltd 17.5%.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] CDW Corp Definitive Proxy Statement
feed.summary: CDW Corporation is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting virtually on May 21, 2026, where shareholders will vote on several key proposals including the election of nine directors, executive compensation, ratification of EY as auditor, and an amendment to permit stockholder action by written consent. The company reported strong 2025 financial results with GAAP net sales of $22.4 billion, reflecting a 6.8% increase, and highlighted its commitment to sound corporate governance and a performance-based executive compensation program. The Board is opposing a shareholder proposal for an independent board chair, arguing for flexibility in leadership structure.

feed.title: Galiano Gold Sets May 13 Release Date for Q1 2026 Results
feed.summary: Galiano Gold (TSE:GAU) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results after market close on May 13, 2026. The company will then host a conference call and webcast on May 14, 2026, to discuss its performance and operations at the Asanko Gold Mine. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates GAU as 'Neutral' citing improving operating performance and cash flow, but also noting bottom-line volatility and execution risks.
